prompt:
Generate request and response schemas for a user registration endpoint based on this Pydantic model:

```python
class UserCreate(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: str = Field(min_length=8, max_length=64)
    full_name: str = Field(max_length=100)
    role: Optional[str] = 'user'

class UserResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    email: EmailStr
    full_name: str
    role: str
    created_at: datetime
```

assertions.name: generates_request_schema
assertions.description: Should generate a schema for UserCreate (request body)

assertions.name: generates_response_schema
assertions.description: Should generate a schema for UserResponse

assertions.name: includes_field_constraints
assertions.description: Should include field constraints (min/max length, required/optional)

assertions.name: includes_field_types
assertions.description: Should include correct field types (string, integer, datetime)

assertions.name: marks_optional_fields
assertions.description: Optional fields (role) should be marked as not required
